event_summary: Visitor-response request may involve doorlock-sensitive actuation.
context_summary: doorbell_detected=true, user input indicates possible visitor-response intent, doorlock state is tracked only as experiment/audit context.
unresolved_reason: Doorlock control is sensitive actuation and is not part of the current autonomous Class 1 low-risk catalog.
manual_confirmation_path: Caregiver must review and explicitly approve or deny through the governed manual confirmation path before any doorlock command is considered.
